metadata.intro: The Relativistic Gateway exploration of the 4D Pseudo-Riemannian manifold, where space and time are unified through the invariant interval. This roadmap traces the evolution from Galilean kinematics to the Einstein Field Equations, revealing the hidden geometric structure of the cosmos.

bridges.classical-mechanics: Relativity extends Newtonian mechanics into the high-velocity regime, replacing Galilean invariance with the Lorentz Group.
bridges.electromagnetism: Maxwell's equations are inherently relativistic, where the electromagnetic field transforms as a second-rank tensor in 4D.
bridges.quantum-physics: The union of relativity and quantum theory leads to Quantum Field Theory and the Dirac Equation.

pillars.title: 1. Special Relativity Foundations
pillars.narrative: Core axioms and kinematic consequences of the constancy of the speed of light.

pillars.title: 2. Minkowski Geometry
pillars.narrative: The mathematical structure of flat 4D spacetime and the invariant interval.

pillars.title: 3. General Relativity & Curvature
pillars.narrative: Gravity as the manifestation of spacetime geometry and the dynamics of manifolds.
